raw.message: Play real-time 6v6 robot battles with players worldwide!

hook.summary: A heavy mech robot unleashes a continuous barrage of gunfire on an enemy target.
hook.visual_action: The camera follows a tan mech from behind as it fires multiple top-mounted guns, showing green energy pulses and shell casings falling.

scene_flow: Mech robot initiates a heavy barrage of fire against a distant enemy unit.
The enemy is destroyed, triggering a 'DOUBLE KILL' announcement and visual effect.
The mech adjusts its position on the urban battlefield.
Transition to a dark end card with sparks and a call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy tactical combat and giant robot warfare.
